title: GOVERNMENT FORMATION PROCEDURE: COMPARATIVE LEGAL ANALYSIS AND PROSPECTS
author: Allambergenov, Saparbay
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This article provides a theoretical and legal analysis of some foreign and domestic regulatory legal acts regulating the mechanism for forming the government and its composition, and proposes for further improvement of some regulatory legal acts in this area.
steps_raw: This article provides a theoretical and legal analysis of some foreign and domestic regulatory legal acts regulating the mechanism for forming the government and its composition, and proposes for further improvement of some regulatory legal acts in this area.
